name: Corn Dogs I
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift all dry ingredients together.
2. Slightly beat the egg and stir in milk.
3. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and stir to mix well.
4. Pour the batter into a tall glass for dipping.
5. Insert sticks into the weiners and dip them one at a time into the batter.
6. Deep fry until golden brown at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
